calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Approval Of Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL'S Motion For Approval Of Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

The court grants the unopposed motion to approve the Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment. The court finds that the warning required by the settlement is in compliance with Proposition 65 (Health & Safety Code, sections 25249.5 to 25249.14); that the award of attorney's fees pursuant to the settlement is reasonable under California law; and that, considering the factors set out in Health & Safety Code, section 25249.7, subdivision (b)(2), and the facts asserted in the moving papers, the penalty amount is reasonable. Accordingly the motion is granted and the parties may submit the proposed consent judgment for signature.

Order and consent judgment signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Approval Of Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

Continued on the court's own motion to October 27, 2025.
